# Dana Liu

VP and industrials sector lead. The most senior person on our team I work with regularly. Mentored me through the [BetaWidgets thesis](../companies/betawidgets-inc.md#margin-trend) work and disagrees productively on almost everything — which is exactly what you want.

## How to work with her

- bring data, not opinions. she'll dismantle an unsupported view in 30 seconds
- she thinks in relative terms (BW vs ACME vs the sector), not absolute terms. frame accordingly
- she's right about ~70% of the disagreements we have. but the 30% where she's wrong, she's wrong because she over-weights incumbency. useful to remember
- prefers async written notes over meetings. lives in slack threads

## Current disagreements with me

1. **BW margin compression** — she thinks transitory (mix + input costs), i think structural (pricing power). [see 2026-05-09 daily](../daily-notes/2026-05-09.md#conversation-w-dana)
2. **Globex switching costs** — she thinks high (custom tooling, 18mo requal), i think differentiated (high for engineered SKUs, low for commodity). productive disagreement
3. **Aftermarket sub-segment** — she thinks it's already priced in, i think not. see [acme-corp.md#sub-segments-worth-distinguishing](../companies/acme-corp.md#sub-segments-worth-distinguishing)

## Background

- Joined ACME 2019, prior 8 years at a long-only industrials fund
- Covers the same competitor set we look at: [BetaWidgets](../companies/betawidgets-inc.md), GammaTech (private), DeltaSystems
- LinkedIn: [linkedin.com/in/danaliu-example](https://www.linkedin.com/in/danaliu-example) (placeholder)
